reviews.review_description: I am a mod in the other game but this game is still in development but so far I like it

me and my found this game and we explored level ones. we spent an hour exploring and we completed it. The tophat cosmetic was amazing too. I love this game and it is so cool. 

Also if u have a discord server pls tell me

developer_response.body: Sorry But there is no discord and i quit making the game

reviews.review_description: This game is amazing for development I’m the first person to play this game with my friend jb also the top hat cosmetic is amazing me and my friend played it and checked around the map it’s kinda hard to move but it’s still amazing can’t wait for the future outcome also quick question can I be mod? And jb too

developer_response.body: Hey your not the first person to play the game sorry and no to mod i have a lot of mods already But What you mean by development it has over 1,000 players and is updated almost everyday
